• Fixed search when not logged in
• Fixed misc. crash reports

What's New in 5.1.1
• Set User and Link Flair (new oauth permission required)
• Upload images in comments
• Format toolbar in compose self text, comment and message screens
• Report rationales based on rules
• Message the Mods button on the Sidebar
• Static action bar added to tablet detail pane
• New black theme widget option
• Fix webview not refreshing properly on in-app browser and slideshow
• Several crash fixes
